node.name: IceCore
node.description: AI-powered ski discovery — find your next pair by vibe, not spec sheet. 1,776 skis, Gemini-ranked. Shelved Apr 2026.

node.name: ros_pc_det
node.description: A real-time 3D point cloud detection system based on ROS2

node.name: LinkWeaver
node.description: Graph-based relationship analysis platform for compliance and entity resolution. Supports fixed-schema ingestion, full-text search, and interactive graph UI. Built with Dgraph and React.

node.name: sage-os
node.description: Educational 32-bit bare-metal OS built with C and x86 Assembly. Features custom bootloader, paging, memory management, and syscall handling. Designed for low-level systems exploration.

node.name: BullBearMail
node.description: Django REST + Next.js subscription and email digest app with Celery/Redis and Docker Compose.
